_meta.note: Temporary computer-team pool for Match Lab v0.8. Opponents are auto-drawn. Names and balance are test data, not settled game design.

teams.name: High Press XI
teams.description: Makes it hardest to play through the first line.

teams.name: Low Block XI
teams.description: Lets you build, then crowds the dangerous areas.

teams.name: Counter XI
teams.description: Offers fewer phase penalties but carries the biggest scoring threat on the reply.

teams.name: Aerial XI
teams.description: Attacks the box from wide areas. Defender height can matter here when known.
